latest.title: Zebra stripes aren't for camouflage
latest.script_key: stripes don t camouflage zebras those bold lines confuse tsetse flies they can t land on stripes like they do on solid hides that s why herds swarm together the stripes blur into a flickering mess watch their ears those twitches aren t for sound they re fly dodging ever felt a fly land on you and just sit there
